data.keyword: Who provides mental health services in Louisville KY?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode Who provides mental health services in Louisville KY?

result.keyword: Who provides mental health services in Louisville KY?

items.markdown:
Several organizations and private practitioners provide mental health services in Louisville, KY, offering a range of care from crisis intervention to individual therapy.[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)[[2]](https://kentuckymentalhealth.com/)[[3]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/)[[4]](http://www.divorcerecoverylouisville.org/gethelp-crisis.html)

**Key Community Mental Health Providers** 

- **Seven Counties Services** : Provides comprehensive behavioral health services, including 24/7 crisis lines for adults (502-589-4313), children (502-589-8070), and addiction help (502-583-3951).
- **Park DuValle Community Health Center** : Offers community-based mental health services (502-774-4401).
- **Spalding University Collective Care Center** : Provides mental health care services (502-792-7011).
- **NAMI Louisville** : Offers support and resources for mental health (502-588-2008).
- **Louisville Recovery Community Connection** : Focuses on addiction recovery support (502-717-8321).
- **The Black Counseling & Consulting Collective** : Provides counseling services (502-414-4380).[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)

**Private Practitioners and Specialized Centers** 

- **Louisville Mind and Wellness LLC** : Located on Baxter Ave, offering services from nurse practitioners.
- **Jim Walker, LCSW** : Provides individual therapy and intake sessions.
- **Dreamcloud Psychology & Educational Services, LLC** : Located on Springhurst Blvd, specializing in therapy for anxiety, ADHD, and mood disorders.
- **Nicole Fletcher Griggs, APRN, PMHNP-BC** : Offers services specializing in depression treatment on Bishop Ln.[[1]](https://www.tebra.com/care/practice/louisville-mind-and-wellness-llc-650686?lid=490335590)[[2]](https://jimwalker.fullslate.com/services/1)[[3]](https://app.squareup.com/appointments/book/eb9c5ddf-fbb9-40ae-8d73-967aad8c9082/NB6KRWR5H44BZ/start?service_id=5NHEWSNEQSS6BKWMP52YM76F&variation_id=XK5C5ZLR3STU22UFBV2L24QX)[[4]](https://www.zocdoc.com/doctor/nicole-fletcher-griggs-aprn-pmhnp-bc-656210?LocIdent=355819&utm_source=reservewithgoogle&utm_medium=seosynd&utm_campaign=hai&entity_id=pr_jICN4JntfEWK_4P5dFaJtQ-lo_X6B0qk02o0e0XbhXgmgwQQ-entity)[[5]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)

For immediate, free, and confidential help, Kentucky's 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline is available.[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)[[2]](https://lightheartassociates.com/psychology-blog/5-mental-health-resources-available-in-seattle-wa/)[[3]](https://www.kysu.edu/student-affairs/health-services/support.php)[[4]](https://www.instagram.com/loumetrooss/)

If you can share whether you're looking for **therapy**, **psychiatry** , or **crisis support** , and if you'd prefer to **use insurance** , I can help you narrow down this list.
